line_items.description: Milestone 2 Delivery: Document Ingestion Pipeline & Classification Model (Beta) [per SOW ENT-SOW-2024-019, Milestone 2]
Additional Data Annotation Services — manual labelling of 1,200 edge-case documents [Change Order CO-2024-003, dated Oct 10, 2024]
Cloud Infrastructure Setup & Configuration — AWS account provisioning, VPC setup, IAM roles [one-time, billed at cost]

summary: This document is an invoice from ENTENTIA AI SOLUTIONS PVT. LTD. to NovaBridge Financial Services Pvt. Ltd., dated October 28, 2024, with a due date of November 27, 2024. The invoice, numbered ENT-INV-2024-0043, totals ₹14,16,000, including GST, for services related to a document ingestion pipeline, data annotation, and cloud infrastructure setup. Payment terms are Net-30, and a late fee of 1.5% per month applies to overdue balances.
